original_test_uspto_scan_20260712.counting_rule: expanded benchmark counts only reviewed/filtered keep_synthetic_negative synthetic rows whose parent positives are in the held-out USPTO expansion positive CSV

chunked_beam_runner.safety: waits for GPU memory/utilization thresholds and zero compute apps by default; skips valid chunks and merges only when all chunks are valid

active_repaired_beam_watcher.status_json_note: monitoring path is reused for active audit; status content points to repaired chunk manifest and repaired beam output dir
active_repaired_beam_watcher.beam_runner_header_fix: feeds Chemformer temporary no-header chunk inputs to prevent predicting the TSV header as an extra sample

benchmark_results_20260714.interpretation: denominator scale complete, but PC-CNG underperforms Chemformer likelihood; no external SOTA claim

score_calibration_20260715.paired_delta_note: paired deltas are computed on shared scored rows; full-beam rows without PC-CNG scores are not counted as hybrid gains
score_calibration_20260715.diagnostic_subgroup_signal: some validation-selected reaction_class hybrids choose w>0, but this is not predeclared held-out evidence and cannot support an external SOTA claim

frozen_preheldout_recipe_audit.preheldout_decision: linear recipes fail validation Top-1; MLP improves validation Top-1 but fails repaired 25k test, so held-out 5k scoring remains deferred for these recipes

heldout_calibration_protocol_20260715.use_boundary: frozen held-out final evaluation input; must not be used for calibration recipe selection
